ProsExcellent noise cancellation: Filters out background noise very effectively, keeping the subject’s voice clear and focused.High-quality audio: Clear and natural sound—good for vlogging, interviews, and voice recordings.Strong default gain: The mic gain is set high by default, which works well for outdoor recording or when your subject isn’t very close to the mic.Versatile use cases: Suitable for voiceovers, podcasts, online meetings, online classes, vlogs, interviews, etc.Convenient charging case (if included): Having the case allows you to charge the mics on the go, which is especially helpful for long sessions and outdoor uses.ConsApp-dependent gain control: Mic gain can only be adjusted through the app, which limits control when using the mic with a camera.Battery life: Battery performance is average; longer shoots may require frequent charging.Range limitations: The wireless range is good for typical use, but may not be ideal in large venues or obstructed environments.Magnet mount instead of clip: The transmitter uses a magnet mount rather than a traditional clip, which may not secure well on all clothing types.Read more

I ordered this cellphone about a month back and had a horrible experience to say the least. I had tremendous trust and confidence on Samsung products as they were extremely durable and of good quality. However, all this shattered with this cellphone purchase. Just after five days or so, the screen/display started malfunctioning. When I paid a visit to the service centre they simply updated the software and sent me back saying it will work. The very next day the cellphone's display again started giving me problems. I again went to the service centre and to my shock - they were not ready to acknowledge the hardware fault. After a lot of struggle with the service centre guys they changed the display. It's been a 5-6 days since and I can say with surety that the device is of low hardware quality. The speaker sound, display, infact everything feels like it's of low quality. I amazed at the kind of experience I have had with Samsung this time. I really wouldn't recommend anyone to buy this product. Guys the service centre guys were behaving as if they didn't care a damn. I have come down to a conclusion that it's not just the hardware but the service of Samsung has declined over the years to a point that they were behaving like a tin pot company. Extremely disappointed, sad but it's 100 % TRUE ! I would definitely stay away from buying Samsung products in future - a company on which I had tremendous trust and confidence ! Review Title: Overall you can should buy realme 15x , or u can buy this also but i suggest realme 15x .
Review Description: First of all, I would like to talk about my Realme Narzo 80 Pro 5G. Overall, it is a very good phone in the 20–22k INR price range. I have been using this phone since 17 August 2025, and today is 28 November 2025—almost 4 months. The gaming performance is very good. The camera quality is also very good in bright environments such as sunlight or outdoors, especially when taking photos of people. Nature photography is also decent. Also sound quality is also good , i'm reading some negative comments , but i want to tell to whomever reading this review , The phone has dual stereo speaker support also , with 300% voice boost .I have the 8 GB RAM + 128 GB storage variant. I strongly suggest buying the 256 GB storage variant because in the 128 GB version, a large portion of the storage is taken by the system—around 30–40 GB. So, you only get about 60–70 GB of usable space, which is quite low for modern usage. Even though the phone is advertised as 128 GB, you don’t actually get the full 128 GB.In terms of performance, I did not face any heating issues. The phone stays cool during normal and even heavy tasks. It only heats slightly while charging, which is completely normal for fast-charging phones. The connectivity is also very good, with strong Wi-Fi and Bluetooth performance. Storage transfer speeds are fast as well, thanks to UFS 3.1 storage.I also appreciate the battery capacity, which is quite good for modern phones (6000 mAh). The battery lasts around 20–21 hours with moderate usage such as YouTube, Instagram Reels, or studying on the PW app. However, I have one issue with the screen. Although the display is very bright, easy to use in sunlight, and has excellent color quality, I would advise avoiding phones with curved displays. If a curved screen breaks after dropping on a cemented road or anywhere else, it is very difficult to find a duplicate replacement screen in the market.Additionally, you cannot expand the memory using an SD card, and there is no audio jack on this phone. On the positive side, the 80W charging is amazing—it charges the phone up to 25% in just 10 minutes and more than 60% in under 30 minutes.Overall, the phone is very good, but I still recommend checking out the Realme 15x. It offers almost the same features and is even better in some aspects because it doesn’t have a curved display. The Realme 15x also comes with 60W SUPERVOOC charging and a massive 7000 mAh battery, which is extremely impressive and lasts even longer.Read more

Review Title: Simple & Clean:  "Best Budget Smartphone with Solid Performance"
Review Description: Realme P4x ke saath mera overall experience truly impressive raha hai, aur yeh smartphone apni price range me ek premium feel deliver karta hai. Sabse pehle baat karun iske design ki, to phone ka look kaafi stylish aur modern hai. Iska slim profile aur solid build quality ise haath me pakadne par ek high-end device jaisa feel deta hai, jo aaj ke users ke liye kaafi important factor hai.Display quality bhi is phone ki ek strong highlight hai. Screen bright, vibrant aur smooth hai, jiski wajah se videos dekhna, social media use karna aur gaming ka experience kaafi enjoyable ho jata hai. Colors natural aur eye-friendly lagte hain, jo long usage me bhi comfort maintain karte hain.Performance ki baat karein to Realme P4x daily tasks me bilkul smooth chalta hai. Multitasking ho ya heavy apps use karna, phone easily handle kar leta hai bina kisi noticeable lag ke. Gaming lovers ke liye bhi yeh ek achha option hai, kyunki graphics aur response time kaafi balanced hai.Battery backup iska ek aur strong point hai. Ek baar full charge karne par yeh phone easily poora din nikal deta hai, jo busy lifestyle ke liye perfect hai. Saath hi fast charging support hone ki wajah se phone jaldi charge ho jata hai, jo kaafi convenient hai.Camera performance bhi kaafi satisfying hai. Daylight me photos sharp aur detailed aati hain, aur colors kaafi natural dikhte hain. Phone quality is very good in this price range. This is my 3rd Realme product. I love this brand. Very user friendly UI. Display is decent. Size and weight wise it's average. The applications run smoothly but RAM is not that powerful and smooth as I expected. I only have shopping applications and still it lags sometimes. Camera quality is quite good with lot of AI features. Can't say about durability though since it came with a cheap screen cover. It is unlikely that it would survive fall or water. So durability wise can't really say. My experience is good overall.Read more
